description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline for the R data.table package using the Docker images registry.gitlab.com/rdatatable/dockerfiles/r-base-gcc for the build job, registry.gitlab.com/rdatatable/dockerfiles/r-pkgdown for the integration job, registry.gitlab.com/rdatatable/dockerfiles/r-base-minimal for the mirror-packages job, and platform‑specific runners (saas-linux-medium-amd64, saas-macos-medium-m1, saas-windows-medium-amd64) for tests. Define stages build, test, integration; the build job runs Rscript to install all DESCRIPTION dependencies, removes the bus directory, strips empty lines from DESCRIPTION, appends the commit SHA as Revision, executes R CMD build ., creates bus/$CI_JOB_NAME/, and moves the generated data.table_*.tar.gz into that directory. In the test stage add linux test jobs (e.g., test‑lin‑rel) that copy the latest tar.gz, run R CMD check --no-manual and R CMD INSTALL --build on it, verify the final check log, and after_script create bus/$CI_JOB_NAME/ with id, status, image and any data.table.Rcheck directory; mac test jobs first install XQuartz and arm64 R, then perform the same check/install steps, and windows test jobs download and silently install R and Rtools, adjust PATH, run R.exe CMD check/install, and after_script move results similarly—each test job allows failure, uses the shared .artifacts‑template (expire in 2 weeks, paths bus/$CI_JOB_NAME), and declares needs on mirror‑packages and build. The integration job (only on master) runs R --version, installs dependencies, copies a favicon, builds the pkgdown site into ./website, appends CI helper scripts to .Rprofile, runs custom R checks, moves the built package into a CRAN‑like repository under bus/integration/cran, writes PACKAGES files for source, Windows and macOS binaries, installs the package into a temporary library, generates HTML package index, copies the website into the integration artifact, and finally injects a Plausible analytics script into all HTML files. Finally, the mirror‑packages job caches bus/$CI_JOB_NAME/cran, runs Rscript to mirror all DESCRIPTION dependencies from the CRAN_MIRROR into bus/mirror-packages/cran, and stores the mirror as an artifact. All jobs inherit the .artifacts‑template (expire in 2 weeks, always) and appropriate tags.
